title: AstrBotDevs/AstrBot
author: AstrBotDevs
summary: AstrBot is an open-source AI Agent Assistant designed to unify multiple instant messaging platforms, large language models (LLMs), and extensible plugins into a single interface. It emphasizes flexibility and customization, positioning itself as an open-source alternative to commercial solutions like OpenClaw. Its architecture supports modular AI features including tool use, multi-platform integration, and plugin-driven functionality.
